author: jih2nn
content:
[FOCIL breakout #35](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2098) <t:1780405200:F>! We can discuss:

- Client development
- Spec and testing

We're having more clients onboarded and are expecting some engine APIs changes that will affect both implementation and testing. Feel free to add agenda, if any!

Note that it's **__13:00 UTC__**, same as last time. See you soon!
